name: Sidebar
description: A composable, themeable, and customizable sidebar component for building dashboard layouts.
whenToUse: Use for dashboard navigation, admin panels, app layouts with persistent side navigation.

props.name: side
props.description: The side the sidebar appears on

props.name: variant
props.description: The visual variant of the sidebar

codeExample:
import { Sidebar, SidebarContent, SidebarGroup, SidebarGroupContent, SidebarGroupLabel, SidebarMenu, SidebarMenuButton, SidebarMenuItem, SidebarProvider, SidebarTrigger, } from "@/components/ui/sidebar" import { Home, Settings } from "lucide-react" export function SidebarDemo() { return ( Application Home Settings
) }
